arabic: وَعَنْ جَابِرٌ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ: «إِنَّ الْعُمْرَى مِيرَاثٌ لِأَهْلِهَا» . رَوَاهُ مُسلم

english.narrator: Jabir reported the Prophet as saying, “What is given in life-tenancy:
english.text:
is part of the inheritance of those who receive it.” 

Muslim transmitted it.
